testcase.name: getAllProducts_returns200
testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\nazar\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.14.13\byte-buddy-agent-1.14.13.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: getProductById_notFound_returns404
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-03-02T11:37:00.861+0200","@version":"1","message":"Fetching product id=99999","logger":"com.lab.ecommerce.product.ProductController","thread":"main","level":"INFO"} Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.created_at,p1_0.name,p1_0.price,p1_0.stock from products p1_0 where p1_0.id=?

testcase.name: createProduct_returns200
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-03-02T11:37:01.078+0200","@version":"1","message":"Creating product name=Test Product","logger":"com.lab.ecommerce.product.ProductController","thread":"main","level":"INFO"} Hibernate: insert into products (created_at,name,price,stock,id) values (?,?,?,?,default)
